description: Error handling and reporting strategy -- validation errors (from manifest loader), render errors (from Puppeteer/Three.js/FFmpeg), actionable error messages with context (file paths, field names, expected vs actual), error codes for programmatic consumers, graceful degradation strategies (e.g., skip optional planes, warn on non-fatal issues).
notes: Tier 4 interface. Spec complete: ErrorReport for programmatic consumers, classifyError/generateSuggestions/extractFFmpegLogTail utilities, DEGRADATION_RULES and MANIFEST_CODE_TO_DEGRADATION exported constants, consolidated error taxonomy. Plain-text CLI formatting is OBJ-046's responsibility (no overlap). Does not introduce new error classes.
